articles.title: Powerful Storms Prompt Tornado Watches Across the Central U.S.
articles.summary: More than 125 million people face some risk of severe weather on Tuesday, forecasters warned, amid a multiday outbreak of storms.
articles.learnerContent:
# Powerful Storms Prompt Tornado Watches Across the Central U.S.

articles.learnerContent:
# Taylor Frankie Paul Won’t Face Charges Following Domestic Violence Investigation

*Source: Variety*

“The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives” star Taylor Frankie Paul will not face charges following a domestic violence investigation by the Draper City Police Department, the Salt Lake County District Attorney’s Office told The Salt Lake Tribune on Tuesday. “Due to the high profile of the defendant, the cases were reviewed by multiple attorneys,” read […]

articles.title: US Blockade Stops Iran-Linked Ships From Crossing Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: U.S. Central Command said that six vessels had complied with directions to turn around and re-enter an Iranian port.
articles.learnerContent:

articles.learnerContent:
# Godzilla Minus Zero stomps through New York in first teaser trailer

*Source: The Verge*

*insert Godzilla screeching sound* Here's the very first look at the next big kaiju feature. Godzilla Minus Zero will continue the story of 2023's Godzilla Minus One , which returned the franchise to the more grounded tone established in the original film, and while the new teaser trailer doesn't show a whole lot, it suggests some big things for the series. Minus Zero is set in 1949, two years after the first movie, "and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity," according to the official logline. Apparently that includes shifting the setting from Tokyo to New York, as we see Godzilla right next to the St … Read the full story at The Verge.

---
